name: Word Ladder
description: A transformation sequence from word beginWord to word endWord using a dictionary wordList is a sequence of words beginWord -> s1 -> s2 -> ... -> sk such that: Every adjacent pair of words differs by a single letter, every si is in wordList (beginWord does not need to be). Given two words and a dictionary, return the number of words in the shortest transformation sequence, or 0 if no such sequence exists.
signature: def ladder_length(begin_word: str, end_word: str, word_list: list[str]) -> int:
constraints: All words consist of lowercase English letters
All words have the same length
